Cost for a Quote
What We Build
Premium
Contracting
Services
01
⚡
General Contracting
From single-day repairs to multi-phase builds, we deploy skilled tradespeople across the Hamilton and Ancaster area — mobilized fast, executed clean.
02
🏠
Full Renovations
Kitchens, bathrooms, basements — complete gut-and-rebuild or targeted upgrades. We manage the project end-to-end so you don't have to.
03
🖌️
Painting
Interior and exterior painting done right. Clean prep, clean lines, clean finish. Whether it's a single room or a full exterior repaint, we treat every surface like it's the last thing people see.
04
📺
TV Media Walls
Custom built-in entertainment centres and feature walls. Clean cable management, integrated lighting, and bespoke millwork that transforms any living space.
05
🪵
Decks & Fencing
Engineered outdoor living and perimeter security — composite decking, pergolas, privacy screens, and premium fencing built for the Hamilton climate.
06
🔲
Flooring
LVP, hardwood, tile and more. Subfloor prep, transitions, and trim work done right the first time. Precision cuts, clean lines, zero shortcuts.
How We Operate
Built
Different.
01
Free Consultation
You reach out, we come to you. No pressure, no cost. We assess the scope, understand your vision, and give you a clear picture of what's possible.
02
Detailed Quote
Transparent itemized pricing. No hidden costs, no surprise add-ons. You know exactly what you're getting and what it costs before a single nail is driven.
03
Scheduled Execution
We show up on time, every time. Daily updates, clean jobsite, and work done to spec. Your home treated with the same respect as our own.
04
Final Walkthrough
We don't leave until you're satisfied. Final inspection together, addressing any details, and handing over a finished product you're proud to live in.
